app/api/routes/assignments.py :: _maybe_schedule_payment_sms
def _maybe_schedule_payment_sms(
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: Session,
    bill_id: uuid.UUID,
    current_user: User,
    enabled: bool,
) -> None:
    if not enabled:
        return
    bill = db.query(Bill).filter(Bill.id == bill_id).first()
    if bill and str(bill.owner_id) == str(current_user.id):
        background_tasks.add_task(
            _schedule_payment_sms,
            str(bill_id),
            str(current_user.id),
        )

app/api/routes/assignments.py :: _schedule_added_deltas
def _schedule_added_deltas(
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    bill_id: str,
    results: list[dict],
) -> None:
    for result in results:
        background_tasks.add_task(
            _broadcast_delta,
            bill_id,
            "added",
            str(result.get("receipt_item_id", "")),
            str(result.get("bill_member_id", "")),
            str(result.get("id", "")),
        )

app/api/routes/assignments.py :: update_assignment
def update_assignment(
    bill_id: uuid.UUID,
    assignment_id: uuid.UUID,
    body: AssignmentUpdate,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    svc = CalculationService(db)
    try:
        assignment = svc.update_assignment(
            str(assignment_id),
            body.model_dump(exclude_unset=True),
        )
    except ValueError:
        return error_response("NOT_FOUND", "Assignment not found", 404)

    db.refresh(assignment)
    result = _assignment_out(assignment)

    background_tasks.add_task(
        _broadcast_delta,
        str(bill_id),
        "updated",
        str(assignment.receipt_item_id),
        str(assignment.bill_member_id),
        str(assignment.id),
    )

    return success_response(data=result, message="Assignment updated")

app/api/routes/assignments.py :: auto_split
def auto_split(
    bill_id: uuid.UUID,
    body: AutoSplitRequest,
    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    svc = CalculationService(db)
    member_ids = [str(mid) for mid in body.member_ids] if body.member_ids else None
    assignments = svc.auto_split(str(bill_id), member_ids)

    _maybe_schedule_payment_sms(
        background_tasks, db, bill_id, current_user, body.send_payment_notifications
    )

    results = _serialize_assignments(db, assignments)
    background_tasks.add_task(_broadcast_full_sync, str(bill_id))

    return success_response(data=results, message="Auto-split completed")
